name: nnaka2992-claude-toolings
description: A collection of reusable Claude Code plugins — hooks, rules, skills, and more

plugins.name: log-interaction
plugins.description: Logs Claude Code interactions (user prompts, tool calls, assistant responses) to hourly log files organized by date

plugins.name: git-rules
plugins.description: Git workflow conventions — conventional commits, force push policy, concise messages

plugins.name: review-changes
plugins.description: Code review skill that checks quality, performance, tests, docs, and security using dedicated subagents
